## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss onboarding and payment processes for two new freelance writers through Upwork.](https://fathom.video/share/TWgax_ANDMZjyxkCLdFFysnQ_f6xBozf?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Two freelancers (Ebatu and Yosip) to be hired through Upwork for writing SEO articles](https://fathom.video/share/TWgax_ANDMZjyxkCLdFFysnQ_f6xBozf?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [Monthly freelancer budget capped at $600 per person](https://fathom.video/share/TWgax_ANDMZjyxkCLdFFysnQ_f6xBozf?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [Upwork to be used for initial projects; potential transition to Remote for long-term engagements](https://fathom.video/share/TWgax_ANDMZjyxkCLdFFysnQ_f6xBozf?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Aida to provide LinkedIn profiles and project details for Upwork setup](https://fathom.video/share/TWgax_ANDMZjyxkCLdFFysnQ_f6xBozf?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)

## Topics

### Freelancer Rates and Budget

  - [Ebatu charges $30/hour, Yosip $17/hour](https://fathom.video/share/TWgax_ANDMZjyxkCLdFFysnQ_f6xBozf?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)
  - [Monthly budget cap: $600 per freelancer](https://fathom.video/share/TWgax_ANDMZjyxkCLdFFysnQ_f6xBozf?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [Initial test: One article each (est. 1 hour, $30 for Ebatu)](https://fathom.video/share/TWgax_ANDMZjyxkCLdFFysnQ_f6xBozf?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)

### Upwork Onboarding Process

  - [Molly to set up milestone-based contracts in Upwork](https://fathom.video/share/TWgax_ANDMZjyxkCLdFFysnQ_f6xBozf?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [Need project details, LinkedIn profiles, and milestones from Aida](https://fathom.video/share/TWgax_ANDMZjyxkCLdFFysnQ_f6xBozf?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [Transparent process: define project, set rate, release payment upon approval](https://fathom.video/share/TWgax_ANDMZjyxkCLdFFysnQ_f6xBozf?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)

### Future Considerations

  - [Potential transition from Upwork to Remote for long-term engagements](https://fathom.video/share/TWgax_ANDMZjyxkCLdFFysnQ_f6xBozf?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Upwork's strict policies against off-platform communication](https://fathom.video/share/TWgax_ANDMZjyxkCLdFFysnQ_f6xBozf?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Freelancers may be hesitant to move off Upwork due to account risks](https://fathom.video/share/TWgax_ANDMZjyxkCLdFFysnQ_f6xBozf?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)

### Project Timeline

  - [Aida to send project details within the next hour](https://fathom.video/share/TWgax_ANDMZjyxkCLdFFysnQ_f6xBozf?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [Wiets and Molly to set up Upwork contracts at 12 PM PST](https://fathom.video/share/TWgax_ANDMZjyxkCLdFFysnQ_f6xBozf?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Freelancers to complete initial articles by Wed/Thurs next week](https://fathom.video/share/TWgax_ANDMZjyxkCLdFFysnQ_f6xBozf?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)

### Miscellaneous

  - [Brief discussion on international taxation (South Africa's high rates)](https://fathom.video/share/TWgax_ANDMZjyxkCLdFFysnQ_f6xBozf?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [AirOps access already granted to freelancers](https://fathom.video/share/TWgax_ANDMZjyxkCLdFFysnQ_f6xBozf?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
